games.label: WARP: Warp Agent Runtime Portal
games.description: Your portal into a TradeWars universe: a live alpha agent platform with automation, operator tooling, and agent-to-agent coordination, all while wrapped around one of the most influential pre-internet online games.

section.title: WARP: Warp Agent Runtime Portal.
section.copy: WARP is your portal into a TradeWars universe: a live alpha platform for running, automating, and operating agents, with agent-to-agent (A2A) coordination, a live operator console with real-time takeover, and multi-account fleet orchestration — all while wrapped around one of the most influential pre-internet online games.

games.label: Undef Dice
games.description: Dice and table tools for shared play at the table and on the network.

section.title: Undef Dice keeps shared play moving.
section.copy: Fast dice and lightweight utilities for groups who want clearer game moments online and off.

games.label: Taybols
games.description: Random tables for tabletop play. Roll for NPCs, encounters, and rumors, build your own, or import a whole book from a PDF.

section.title: Taybols rolls the random tables your game needs.
section.copy: Roll weighted tables for NPCs, encounters, moods, and rumors, or drop in a PDF to turn a sourcebook into rollable tables. Everything stays on your device, with no account and no sync.

games.label: Grove
games.description: Browser-based git history visualizer — directories as a force-directed tree, files orbiting as colored dots, contributors gliding between them. No install.

section.title: Grove plays a repository back as a living tree.
section.copy: Point it at any git history and watch directories spread into a force-directed tree while files orbit as colored dots and contributors glide between them firing beams. No install, no backend — a live demo the moment the page loads, and a drag-anywhere timeline to scrub the whole history.

games.label: haiku.to
games.description: Write haiku, watch them fall, remix what other people leave behind.

section.title: haiku.to turns three lines into a shared feed.
section.copy: Write a haiku, watch it fall through the feed, and remix the ones other people leave behind. Compose in five-seven-five, follow a thread of variations, or let the day's verses drift past.

games.label: becoming.to
games.description: One affirmation a day. You are already on your way.

games.label: proverb.to
games.description: One old saying a day. Draw the water and it rises.

games.label: stoke.to
games.description: One motivational quote a day. Stoke the fire.

games.label: currents.to
games.description: A daily ambient puzzle on a sumi-e canvas — one brushstroke to carve a riverbed. Same landscape for everyone.

games.label: amor.to
games.description: A quiet place for two. Not a messaging app — a shared digital terrarium.
